name: CKX LANDS, INC.
business: CKX Lands, Inc. generates income from mineral royalties, timber sales, and surface payments from its lands. The company leases its property to oil and gas operators and collects income through oil and gas royalties and lease rentals. It also sells timber and leases surface rights for farming, recreational, and commercial uses.

exposures.sentence: CKX receives income from royalty interests and mineral leases related to oil and gas production, timber sales, land sales and surface rents.
Timber income is derived from sales of timber on Company lands.
Surface income is earned from various recurring and non-recurring sources.
Recurring surface income is earned from lease arrangements for farming, recreational and commercial uses.
In 2019, the Company began developing several ranchette-style subdivisions on certain of its lands in Calcasieu and Beauregard Parishes using existing road rights of way.
